task: Build the proof-led FrankX executive AI architecture homepage
audience: Founders, operators, and technical leaders who need governed AI workflows
references: FrankX brand world: direct, technical, results-first
Existing FrankX portrait and visual registry
Existing public ACOS repository and architecture routes

direction.keep: One executive AI architecture route, real proof, editorial restraint, and honest ecosystem handoffs
direction.avoid: Catalog-homepage density, fake metrics, generic AI gradients, decorative 3D, and unsupported outcomes
direction.signature: A real architecture presentation paired with an inspectable operating-system narrative
direction.system: Obsidian base, emerald authority signal, cyan mechanism signal, static server-rendered composition

asset_quality.why_premium: The hero is a real FrankX architecture presentation and directly proves the work described by the page.

artifacts.kind: exact-head Vercel preview inspected at desktop, mobile, reflow, and reduced motion
immutable responsive and reduced-motion verification receipt

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Real presentation photograph; no generated or decorative primary asset

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Hero source and desktop/mobile PNG captures inspected

checks.name: desktop-first-viewport
checks.evidence: Dominant claim, primary route, real proof, and readable contrast are visible

checks.name: mobile-first-viewport
checks.evidence: Exact-head preview inspected at 390x844 and 640 CSS px reflow with zero document overflow or clipped visible and interactive elements

checks.name: reduced-motion
checks.evidence: Exact-head reduced-motion preview matched the preference with zero running animations; the homepage adds no scroll choreography, parallax, or autoplay media

checks.name: public-language
checks.evidence: Strict claim audit passed and changed files contain no banned AI-slop phrases

checks.name: performance
checks.evidence: Server component, optimized local image, no homepage-specific client runtime, production build passed

score.note: Exact-head preview passed desktop, 390px mobile, reflow, and reduced-motion inspection with Tier A proof and no clipping or overflow.
